nasb.text: Then Joseph took them from his knees, and bowed with his face to the ground.

esv.text: Then Joseph removed them from his knees, and he bowed himself with his face to the earth.

cnv.text: 約瑟把兩個兒子從以色列膝上抱下來，自己臉伏在地下拜。

ccb.text: 约瑟把两个儿子从以色列的膝旁领开，自己向父亲俯伏下拜，

csbs.text: 约瑟把他们从以色列的膝盖挪开，自己脸伏于地下拜。
